+----------------------+
|                      |
|      +---------+     |
|      |  Write  |     |
|      +---------+     |
|           ^          |
|           |          |
|     +-----+----+     |
|     |  Format  |     |
|     +----------+     |
|           ^          |
|           |          |
|           +------+++ |
+[  Output Stage  ]ooo-+
              ++---+++
+-------------oo-----------+
|             |            |
|             |            |
|       +-----+-----+      |
|       |  Convert  |      |
|       +-----------+      |
|             ^            |
|             |            |
|      +------+-----+      |
|      |  Validate  |      |
|      +------------+      |
|             ^            |
|             +-------+++  |
+[  Transform Stage  ]ooo--+
          ++--------+-+++
+---------oo--------+
|         |         |
|         |         |
|    +----+----+    |
|    |  Parse  |    |
|    +---------+    |
|         ^         |
|         |         |
|    +----+---+     |
|    |  Read  |     |
|    +--------+     |
|                   |
|                   |
+[  Input Stage  ]--+
